name: each emitted rule's enforced_by[] is populated by route-rule.sh Stage 3+4 with the appropriate FOSS tool(s) for its 4-axis kind
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r12-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Encrypt S3 buckets at rest in Terraform

Every aws_s3_bucket terraform resource MUST configure server_side_encryption_configuration with AES256 or KMS.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml </dev/null; python3 -c 'import re; t = open("'$OUT'/out/us-government/r12-src.yaml").read(); tools = re.findall(r"^\s+- tool:\s+(\S+)", t, re.M); exit(0 if "checkov" in tools and "trivy" in tools else 1)' && echo emitted-rules-routed-to-foss-tools 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
